---
title: "rpc.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/cstar/core/rpc.py"
loc: 62
complexity: 5
logic_score: 3.23
style_score: 3.89
intel_score: 7.85
overall_score: 5.56
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating SovereignRPC, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import SovereignRPC and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 39 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [sqlite3](file://sqlite3)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `SovereignRPC`
- `__init__`
- `get_recent_traces`
- `get_architectural_suggestions`
- `get_dashboard_state`
- `_parse_tasks`
